resources.description: Overview of how traditional machine‑learning algorithms are applied to NLP tasks.

resources.description: YouTube video introducing deep‑learning architectures for NLP with practical coding demos.

resources.description: Wikipedia pages that explain syntactic and semantic analysis, essential for NLP understanding.

resources.description: Khan Academy lessons on syntax and semantics that can be used to generate quiz items.

resources.description: Wikipedia entry covering cutting‑edge topics such as transformers, multilingual models, and zero‑shot learning.

resources.description: YouTube video that breaks down attention mechanisms and shows how to fine‑tune pretrained models for transfer learning.
